elements.title: Irish War News
elements.contents: ... that the second issue of Irish War News was printed eight years after the first (pictured)?

elements.title: kidnapping and killing a former de facto president of Argentina
elements.contents: ... that four years after kidnapping and killing a former de facto president of Argentina, the guerrilla Montoneros snatched his body to demand the repatriation of Eva Perón's remains from Spain?

elements.title: Hashi Mohamed
elements.contents: ... that British journalist and barrister Hashi Mohamed was a refugee from Somalia when he was aged nine?

elements.title: has been described as "the new 2016"
elements.contents: ... that 2026 has been described as "the new 2016"?

elements.title: Moi Renée
elements.contents: ... that Beyoncé credited Moi Renée as a songwriter on "Pure/Honey" twenty-five years after Renée's death?

elements.title: Commonwealth MRT station
elements.contents: ... that Commonwealth MRT station's platform columns have been compared to the columns in Singapore shophouses?

elements.title: Saint Monegundis
elements.contents: ... that Saint Monegundis left her husband and became an anchorite after the deaths of her two daughters?

elements.title: HiAnime
elements.contents: ... that the pirate anime streaming site HiAnime had more visitors than legal competitors like Crunchyroll or Disney+?

elements.title: Mingering Mike
elements.contents: ... that Mingering Mike spent nearly a decade creating a fictional music career complete with albums, singles, and record labels?
